review_text: We were a group of four and none of us had been to Los Tres Amigos before.  It was a great time, the service was fast and efficient.  Everyone loved their food. Good ingredients, lots of choices, great flavor, wonderful service. What more can you want.
The people were great. It's not a place frequented by Latinos, which tells you it's catered for the Caucasian taste buds. Quiet bland and not something I would revisit.
Food is always amazing here! Drinks always more than exceptional! Jorge was so sweet and made the whole experience that more enjoyable!
The margarita was huge and delicious, our server Jorge was excellent and provided great customer service!
Jorge was great!

We did not have a good experience tonight, unfortunately. The chips that were brought out with the salsa when we sat down gave off a rancid oil smell. I had the Quesadilla Rellena with beef chunks which was okay, though a bit overpriced at $13.99 for only 1 slightly filled flour tortilla and lettuce, tomato, and a tablespoon each of sour cream and guac on the side. My husband ordered the Enchilladas Supremas. I was so surprised when my easy-to-please husband said it might have been the worst meal he's ever had. He said the ground beef just did not taste right. I probably wouldn't have posted a negative review based solely on a meal that didn't quite hit the mark, but at 8:15pm the staff was vacuuming the vestibule area for several minutes as another staff member noisely used a broom and dustpan on the floor right next to diners. The restaurant was nearly 2 hours away from closing (10pm)! Really put off by our experience and it's doubtful we'll return.

Im done eating and in the car writing the review. They started putting the chairs on top of the tables at 9:15. 4 more parties came in after me. The place is too small to start closing with so many customers still in the store. Not the friendliest either. I will not return.
Marvel is a goat
Thank you Darvin for your kind hospitality!
Marvel was Great
Fantastic food, atmosphere, and service! Our waiter, Marvel, was very attentive and friendly. Our food and drinks were served in a timely manner and were full of flavor. Highly recommend!
Marvel was a great server!
Very good food and vegan options, Marvel took great care of us
Marvel was amazing!! Wonderful recommendation, my husband loved his lunch!

We had Marvel, and he did a great job of checking in with us to make sure we had everything we needed.
The food was fantastic! Marvel was wonderful! The margaritas are strong and made with real fruit, what more could a girl ask for?!
Marvel provides excellent service and as always the food was delicious!

Marvel was very nice and attentive. Place was super cold inside, but the food was amazing.
Large portions

Steak fajita salad bowl is awesome, and all the food is absolutely delicious. Marvel the waiter is so warm, attentive, and genuinely caring. You can tell he really takes pride in what he does and making sure we have a great lunch experience.
Marvel our server was amazing
Our server Marvel was marvel-ous! Great place to grab a quick, delicious lunch.

Mixed review here, but they shine where it counts! Service was good, atmosphere is what you'd expect. But I'll be honest, I don't love their chips or salsa or margaritas. The chips taste like they're out of a bag, the salsa is pretty much tomato sauce. And I was kind of disappointed by mango margarita as well. Even the fried ice cream was meh. BUT, I had the Polli Poblano as an entree, and it was amazing! The chicken was tender, the veggies and sauce were delicious and the refried black beans were the best refried beans i've ever had!

Moral of the story... skip the chips and salsa, the drink, even the dessert, and save room for the entrees, where they shine!

What a ridiculous experience! When we walked in, the restaurant had about 10 full tables. First, we waited around 10 minutes before anyone acknowledged us, even though there were staff close by. Once we were sat, it took about 10 minutes for a server to greet us/bring chips. We ordered 2 sodas and an appetizer. We had to go up to the bar to ask for our drinks after waiting 7-8 minutes after we placed our drink order. I wish we had gotten up and left at this point, but we were starving and figured it would get better. 6-7 minutes later, the Queso Fundido was served. It was disgusting - weird, congealed cheese, and dry clumps of chorizo on top. We weren't given any small plates to use. We had to go back up to the bar again for own refills on our drinks. Our food comes out, with 2 sides of beans and no rice (which we did not ask for.) We had to flag down our server/anyone we could find to ask from the correct side for our meal. Meals were terribly bland and on the cool side. The waitress did come back once to check on us (a few bites into our meals), but when we had finished eating, we had to get up again and go the host stand (and wait for someone to come by) to ask for carryout boxes and the check. More waiting - another 8-9 minutes before she returned to take care of the check. Honestly, I should have refused to pay. The service was horrendous and the food wasn't much better. We will never return.

Today, I went to eat a Los Tres Amigos in Northville, Michigan. My ser was Marcel and lets just sat he lived up to the name and was Marvelous.  He was very attentive when it came to any needs that I had.  I'm a big drinker of water & constantly need refills.  He was all over it & did it that without  me asking.  The food was excellent.  I had the jalapeno poppers. My friend had the lunch special for the fajitas, which was the same size as a dinner entree but just half the price, absolutely amazing.  The two of us wonderfully for lunch & at $10 or less, a person.  We will definitely be back. Look forward to seeing marvel again.
Easygoing spot, great music, good food, and very accommodating for a toddler. Thanks Marvel for your kind service!
The best service and good.
We've gone a few times now. Jorge and Marvel were excellent hosts! The food was amazing. Check this place out when you can!

We love this place for a quick lunch. My go to is fajita or taco salad and my husbands is Burrito Amigo. Great service from Marvel.
Marvel was a great server. Food was wonderful.

Have been coming here for a few years. Have never been disappointed. Generous portion sizes and always quick and polite service. Make sure to say thanks to the wonderful staff like Marvel, who served us tonight!

We came on a weekday, so it was quiet. The starters and main course were great. The portion sizes were generous and tasted very good. Our server, Mildred, was very attentive throughout the evening. If there was a letdown, it was the desserts. The churritos were not evenly crispy, had a bit of a chewiness to it. The flan tasted great. Both deserts could have done without the whipped cream, sprinkles and chocolate sauce it came with.
Loved our meal and our server Mildred was super kind and attentive. Keep up the great work! Will be back.
Darvin was great!

If you go in for lunch and the 50s aged guy decides to wait on you (sitting at the bar), double check your bill when you go to pay.  Twice now, my bill has been normal but when it's swiping time, it's been doubled or things have been added.
Plus it seems he uses the language barrier to make mistakes which also adds things to your order.

The food is good.  But it's not worth the hassle.

Let's head over to CVS

this place will never get old! i have been here many times with my family and their food is always spot on! and on top of it all, their service is excellent! (shoutout to Marvel!)

Every visit to Los Tres Amigos has been outstanding. The food is always delicious, and Marvel consistently serves everything with such a warm smile and wonderful attitude. Thank you, Marvel, for always taking such great care of us and making each experience so enjoyable. We always look forward to coming back!

Los Tres Amigos never disappoints. Every visit has been exceptional, with delicious food, excellent service, and a very welcoming atmosphere. Marvel always goes above and beyond to make us feel wonderful, serving everything with a smile and making us feel truly appreciated. Thank you for consistently providing such an outstanding dining experience. We highly recommend it!
Marvel was very nice.

Sat outside, service was slow, even though they weren't busy at all inside. Waiter was nice, brought chips and salsa for our group of 4, took drink orders. Ran ourt of chips and salsa quickly as there were 4 of us. Asked for more when he brought drinks, which were good. We also ordered dinners at that time. I ordered the Pollo Loco,  with black beans. The meal I got was the Pollo Jalisco, but I took it anyway, wasnt going to send it back. Refried black beans were super watery. Never got the second round of chips and salsa.  First time at this Los Tres Amigos, I love the ones in Howell and Farmington, this one just didn't measure up to those.

Thank you for accommodating our group of 12 today! We appreciate the great service, yummy  food, warm chips and the salsa was tasty. This was our first visit to the Northville location and we will be back next time we are in the area.

My husband and I were craving Mexican food. Based on so many positive recent reviews we decided on Los Tres Amigos Northville. The reviews  did not match our experience.  Jalepeno poppers did not appear to be freshly made and the cheese was cool and solid not hot and gooey. Sample Platter quesadilla  also had cool set cheese. The flauta and chimichanga were warm not hot. The Sample Platter had one positive, the lettuce looked fresh. Living in San Diego and visiting multiple regions in Mexico, fajitas were always served on a sizzling skillet. We were served a pile of peppers and onions in a shallow dish. We had to hunt for the steak. Many reviews rave about the service.  Unfortunately, we don't share the same opinion. I am not sure why our food and service did not live up to others reviews but we will not be returning or recommending this restaurant.
I always have to get the arroz con pollo. So amazing and always enough for lunch tomorrow I get so stuffed. Marvel was amazing!
Marvel is a great waiter! Great service and amazing food!
Great lunch!
Always a go to for us! We love their food & Marvel:)

Phenomenal experience. We were just looking for a lunch spot with margaritas and Los Tres Amigos dis not disappoint. Huge portions, good prices, wonderful ambiance, and great food! Definitely worth a stop in downtown Northville!
Good food, good service!
Marvel helped us well (that rhymed)
Great food and great service from Marvel!
Great service from Marvel
The food is very very tasty and the service was great while I was here.

The food is great and Marvel kept the service (and the salsa) moving well without making us feel rushed!

How this place has good ratings is a mystery. The service is so bad, you feel like you are inconveniencing them. It's so bad it seems intentional. Food is good but there is a better Mexican restaurant on every corner. Don't waste your money

Los Tres was my first Mexican food when I came to the USA over 20 years ago. I've loved it ever since. I was glad they opened one in Northville. Love going there. Food is always quality and Marvel is fantastic. He's our server most every time we're there.
Marvel was attentive and kind! And my fajita quesadilla was AMAZING!

Amazing place with authentic food! I was around this side of town, and decided to try this place with my husband and it did not disappoint. The food was extremely authentic, and I felt like I was back in Mexico. Marvel did not disappoint, super attentive and kind, making sure we were taken care of and he prepared us some amazing margaritas. Will deff come back!
The food was incredible and so was the service! Marvel was awesome I would come back just because of him!
Marvel was an excellent server! Very attentive and effective! Great food, atmosphere, and service! Definitely recommend.

Marvel was an excellent server! Made sure our drinks were refilled frequently and food came out quickly. Food was amazing!
Marvel was a marvelous server! Great food and atmosphere outdoors!

Good server. Attentive

Great food and fast service!! Our waiter was wonderful!

It takes a LOT for me to review a restaurant negatively. But I’ve never been more offended in my life. We specifically asked how many chicken tenders come in a child’s meal. We were told 4. They were 2 cut in half and they were the size of a chicken nugget from McDonald’s. My 4 year old would need 3 meals and my 2 year old would need 2. What a disgrace. And we got it as carry out so we couldn’t do anything about it. I’m so mad about this. I got carry out to make my life slightly easier and here I am now trying to whip up a meal for my kids.

Really great service, and atmosphere even between rushes. Marvel was our server, he was FANTASTIC. Very attentive and kept coming back to check on us. Food was delicious and well priced. :)

The worst restaurant experience I have ever had.

I placed a takeout order with Ava S. and, after a 30-minute drive home, discovered that my $56 order was poorly prepared, under-seasoned, carelessly thrown together, and partially undercooked. There was even hair wrapped around my jalapeño peppers. The food was so unappetizing that I wouldn't have served it to anyone.

What makes this experience even worse is what I witnessed while waiting for my order. I watched the manager handling fruit garnishes for drinks with his bare hands immediately after touching a yellow and black bag, directly in front of the garnish tray. No gloves, no handwashing—nothing. It was unsanitary and honestly should have been my sign to leave.

When I called simply requesting that my food be replaced, the manager hung up on me. I wasn't asking for a refund, causing a scene, or demanding anything unreasonable. I just wanted the food I paid for to be prepared correctly. Instead, I was met with rudeness and complete disregard for customer service.

I'm not someone who typically leaves negative reviews, but the combination of poor food quality, questionable food-handling practices, and a manager hanging up on a paying customer is unacceptable. Customers deserve to know what they're walking into.

There are plenty of Mexican restaurants in the area that take pride in cleanliness, quality food, and treating customers with respect. Unfortunately, this establishment appears more concerned with taking your money than providing a positive dining experience.

The economy is too expensive for customers to spend their hard-earned money on food that is carelessly prepared and service that is openly disrespectful. Based on what I witnessed, I have serious concerns about the cleanliness standards being followed. If employees are handling drink garnishes with bare hands, it raises legitimate questions about what other health and safety practices may be ignored behind the scenes.

At this point, they can keep the remake. After the way I was treated by management, I have no interest in returning. I will be reporting my concerns to the health department so they can determine whether proper food safety procedures are being followed.

Extremely disappointed, disgusted, and frustrated.
